chapter_title.en: The Merits of Karbalā and the Ziyārah of Ĥusain (a.s.)

text: 7 وَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (ع) الْغَاضِرِيَّةُ تُرْبَةٌ مِنْ بَيْتِ الْمَقْدِسِ

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 7. My father and ‘Ali ibn Ḥusain both narrated to me from ‘Ali ibn Ibrāhīm, from his father, from Muḥammad ibn ‘Ali, from Abī Sa’īd Al-‘Usfuri, from Ḥammād ibn Ayyūb, who said: Abū ‘Abdillāh (Imam Sādiq (a.s.)) narrated from his fathers (a.s.), from the Commander of the Believers (a.s.), who said: The Messenger of Allāh (s.a.a.w.) said: My son will be buried in a land called Karbalā. It is the land which contained the Dome of Islam wherein Allāh saved the believers who believed in Nūḥ at the time of the flood.
